description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image with a pip cache at .cache/pip and a virtual‑environment cache at venv/. Define three stages: test, build, and deploy (the deploy stage is unused). Add a before_script that runs `pip3 install -r requirements.txt` for all jobs. In the test stage add a test job that executes `cd autogram`, `wget https://core.telegram.org/bots/api -O tgbotapi.html`, `python3 _gen.py`, `cd ..`, `python3 setup.py install`, `pip3 install -r requirements_tests.txt`, and `python3 -m pytest`. In the build stage add a wheel job that runs the same first three commands, then `cd ..` and `python3 setup.py bdist_wheel`, and publishes the generated wheels matching `dist/Autogram-*.whl` as artifacts. Set the variable PIP_CACHE_DIR to `$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache`.
